title: Device Settings  - Custom button - Teams Not Detected
scenario: When Microsoft Teams is not connected, selecting the Teams custom button shows a modal prompting the user to choose Other Providers to assign custom actions.
steps: Open the Teams Custom button settings on a Falcon headset.
Observe the default UI layout showing two options: Microsoft Teams (selected by default) and Other Providers.
With Microsoft Teams selected and not connected, observe the UI message prompting to select Other Providers to assign custom actions.
Select Other Providers to reveal additional options: Play/Pause, Voice Assistant, Hold/Resume Call, ANC/Transparency Mode, and Do Nothing.
Select Microsoft Teams again while Teams is not connected.
expected: A modal appears with the message: "Microsoft Teams is not connected. Select Other Providers to assign other custom actions."
